title: 50 Pack Windproof Washing Line Hanger Hooks with Non-Slip Lock, Drop-proof Laundry Pegs Silicone Strips for Outdoor Hanging Rope Line (Mix Color)
features: Package : 50 pcs Silicone Clothes Hanger Fixed Hooks with mixed colors. minky pegs
Easy To Use : Windproof hanger buckle,Pass the hanger buckle around the drying rod, clamp it tightly, and hang the hanger in the hole at the bottom to fit all kinds of hangers.
Good quality : The non-slip clothes support cover are made of silicone,strong and durable, not easy to break and deform.
Multi-use : The silicone anti-slip hanger buckle can fit almost any thickness of washing line and drying rod,no matter how strong the wind is,it will keep your clothes hanger in place!
